name: Pizza Planet
author: Poki
description: Pizza Planet is a fun simulation game where you run a little pizza shop on a small planet. Grow your own crops, get new animals, and bake a bunch of different types of pizza’s to satisfy your hungry customers! What recipe will you come up with next? How to play Pizza Planet? Computer: Move left by pressing A or arrow left, move right by pressing D or arrow right. To interact with something or enter a building, simply stand in front of it for a moment. Click on your plants/animals to upgrade them. Mobile: Tap the buttons on the bottom to move around. To interact with something or enter a building, simply stand in front of it for a moment. Tap on your plants/animals to upgrade them. Who created Pizza Planet? Pizza Planet is created by FM Studio. Play their other games on Poki: Doodle Race , Detective Lawrence , Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe , Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 2 , Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 3 , Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 4 , Forgotten Hill: The Wardrobe 5 , Forgotten Hill Memento: Playground , Forgotten Hill Memento: Love Beyond , Forgotten Hill Memento: Buried Things , Forgotten Hill: Puppeteer , Forgotten Hill: Fall , Forgotten Hill: Surgery , Little Cabin in the Woods and Pixel Volley ! How can I play Pizza Planet for free? You can play Pizza Planet for free on Poki. Can I play Pizza Planet on mobile devices and desktop? Pizza Planet can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
